requirement_topic.en: Dangerous Goods Transport Classification & UN 38.3 Testing — BESS (Romania)
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统危险货物运输分类与UN 38.3测试——罗马尼亚
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統危險貨物運輸分類與UN 38.3測試——羅馬尼亞

summary.en: Lithium batteries in BESS shipped to Romania are classified as Class 9 dangerous goods (UN 3480 — lithium ion batteries; UN 3481 — lithium ion batteries contained in or packed with equipment) under the UN Model Regulations. Romania applies ADR (road), RID (rail), IMDG (sea via Constanta port), and IATA (air) frameworks. All lithium batteries must pass UN 38.3 testing (UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) before transport. A UN 38.3 Test Summary (per IATA 2024 DGR PI 965/967/968 and IMDG Code Amendment 41-22) must accompany each consignment. Constanta is Romania's main port for Black Sea and global freight.
summary.zh: 运往罗马尼亚的储能系统中的锂电池，依联合国危险货物运输建议书被列为第9类危险货物（UN 3480——锂离子电池；UN 3481——设备中内含或随附的锂离子电池）。罗马尼亚适用ADR（公路）、RID（铁路）、IMDG（经康斯坦察港的海运）和IATA（空运）框架。所有锂电池在运输前须通过UN 38.3测试（联合国测试和标准手册第三部分第38.3节）。每批货物须随附UN 38.3测试摘要（依据IATA 2024 DGR PI 965/967/968及IMDG规则修正案41-22）。康斯坦察是罗马尼亚通往黑海及全球货运的主要港口。
summary.zht: 運往羅馬尼亞的儲能系統中的鋰電池，依聯合國危險貨物運輸建議書被列為第9類危險貨物（UN 3480——鋰離子電池；UN 3481——設備中內含或隨附的鋰離子電池）。羅馬尼亞適用ADR（公路）、RID（鐵路）、IMDG（經康斯坦察港的海運）和IATA（空運）框架。所有鋰電池在運輸前須通過UN 38.3測試（聯合國測試和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節）。每批貨物須隨附UN 38.3測試摘要（依據IATA 2024 DGR PI 965/967/968及IMDG規則修正案41-22）。康斯坦察是羅馬尼亞通往黑海及全球貨運的主要港口。

standards_or_laws: UN Model Regulations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods (23rd revised edition)
UN 38.3 — Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (lithium battery testing)
ADR 2023 — European Agreement concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Road
RID 2023 — Regulations concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Rail
IMDG Code Amendment 41-22 (sea transport, Constanta port)

summary.en: China's domestic dangerous-goods transport regulations for lithium batteries include GB/T 28014-2011 (lithium battery air transport) and JT/T 617 series (road transport). Chinese export consignments must also pass UN 38.3 testing, which is required globally. However, Chinese manufacturers' UN 38.3 test reports must comply with the most current edition (8th edition, 2023) including the Test Summary document format required by IATA/IMDG. Older test reports may not satisfy current Constanta port or Romanian customs requirements.
summary.zh: 中国国内锂电池危险货物运输法规包括GB/T 28014-2011（锂电池航空运输）和JT/T 617系列（公路运输）。中国出口货物亦须通过UN 38.3测试（全球通用要求）。但中国制造商的UN 38.3测试报告须符合最新版本（2023年第8版），包括IATA/IMDG要求的测试摘要文件格式。较旧的测试报告可能不满足当前康斯坦察港或罗马尼亚海关的要求。
summary.zht: 中國國內鋰電池危險貨物運輸法規包括GB/T 28014-2011（鋰電池航空運輸）和JT/T 617系列（公路運輸）。中國出口貨物亦須通過UN 38.3測試（全球通用要求）。但中國製造商的UN 38.3測試報告須符合最新版本（2023年第8版），包括IATA/IMDG要求的測試摘要文件格式。較舊的測試報告可能不滿足當前康斯坦察港或羅馬尼亞海關的要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 28014-2011 — Lithium batteries for air transport
JT/T 617.7-2018 — Road transport of dangerous goods (lithium batteries)
UN 38.3 (8th edition, 2023) — also required for China domestic export DG compliance

gap.en: Key gap: Chinese manufacturers must ensure their UN 38.3 test reports are issued under the 8th edition (2023) requirements, including the mandatory Test Summary document format (per IATA 2024 DGR and IMDG 41-22). Test reports from earlier editions may not be accepted at Constanta port or by Romanian customs. State of Charge (SoC) compliance for sea shipment (≤30% SoC for certain cell types) must be documented. ADR road-transport classification and packaging must be verified for Romanian road legs after Constanta discharge.
gap.zh: 主要差距：中国制造商须确保其UN 38.3测试报告依据第8版（2023年）要求出具，包括强制性测试摘要文件格式（依据IATA 2024 DGR及IMDG 41-22）。较早版本的测试报告可能不被康斯坦察港或罗马尼亚海关接受。海运装载量（特定电芯类型≤30% SoC）须有文件记录。在康斯坦察卸货后的罗马尼亚公路运输段，须按ADR核实公路运输分类和包装。
gap.zht: 主要差距：中國製造商須確保其UN 38.3測試報告依據第8版（2023年）要求出具，包括強制性測試摘要文件格式（依據IATA 2024 DGR及IMDG 41-22）。較早版本的測試報告可能不被康斯坦察港或羅馬尼亞海關接受。海運裝載量（特定電芯類型≤30% SoC）須有文件記錄。在康斯坦察卸貨後的羅馬尼亞公路運輸段，須按ADR核實公路運輸分類和包裝。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 testing and ADR/IMDG/RID/IATA compliance are legally required for all lithium battery shipments to/through Romania.
mandatory_status.cn: UN 38.3 is mandatory globally for lithium battery export. China's domestic DG transport regulations (JT/T 617 series, GB/T 28014) are mandatory within China.

source.publisher: Port of Constanta (CN Administratia Porturilor Maritime SA Constanta)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 testing (8th edition, 2023) with current Test Summary format is mandatory for BESS lithium battery shipments to Romania via Constanta. ADR compliance is required for Romanian road transport. Exporters must verify that test reports and DG declarations meet current edition requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 经康斯坦察港运往罗马尼亚的储能系统锂电池，须具备UN 38.3测试（2023年第8版）及当前测试摘要格式文件。罗马尼亚公路运输须符合ADR要求。出口商在出货前须核验测试报告和危险货物申报符合当前版本要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 經康斯坦察港運往羅馬尼亞的儲能系統鋰電池，須具備UN 38.3測試（2023年第8版）及當前測試摘要格式文件。羅馬尼亞公路運輸須符合ADR要求。出口商在出貨前須核驗測試報告和危險貨物申報符合當前版本要求。

requirement_topic.en: Dangerous Goods Packaging, Marking, Labelling & Documentation — BESS to Romania
requirement_topic.zh: 危险货物包装、标识、标签与单证——储能系统运往罗马尼亚
requirement_topic.zht: 危險貨物包裝、標識、標籤與單證——儲能系統運往羅馬尼亞

summary.en: Lithium battery BESS shipments to Romania must comply with ADR 2023 (road, including post-Constanta Romanian road legs), IMDG Code 41-22 (sea, Constanta port), and IATA DGR 2024 (air). Requirements include: UN-specification outer packaging; Class 9 lithium battery labels (IATA Label 9A, IMDG Class 9 label); Handling labels (lithium battery mark); Dangerous Goods Declaration (DGD) for sea/air; Multimodal Dangerous Goods Form; Emergency Response Guide (Romanian-language version of ERG 2024 recommended for in-country road transport). State-of-Charge controls and watt-hour thresholds per PI 965-968 must be documented.
summary.zh: 运往罗马尼亚的储能系统锂电池须符合ADR 2023（公路，包括康斯坦察后的罗马尼亚公路段）、IMDG规则41-22（海运，康斯坦察港）和IATA DGR 2024（空运）。要求包括：符合联合国规范的外包装；第9类锂电池标签（IATA Label 9A，IMDG第9类标签）；操作标签（锂电池标记）；海运/空运危险货物申报（DGD）；多式联运危险货物表格；紧急响应指南（推荐在境内公路运输中使用罗马尼亚语版ERG 2024）。须记录符合PI 965-968的荷电状态控制和瓦时门限。
summary.zht: 運往羅馬尼亞的儲能系統鋰電池須符合ADR 2023（公路，包括康斯坦察後的羅馬尼亞公路段）、IMDG規則41-22（海運，康斯坦察港）和IATA DGR 2024（空運）。要求包括：符合聯合國規範的外包裝；第9類鋰電池標籤（IATA Label 9A，IMDG第9類標籤）；操作標籤（鋰電池標記）；海運/空運危險貨物申報（DGD）；多式聯運危險貨物表格；緊急響應指南（推薦在境內公路運輸中使用羅馬尼亞語版ERG 2024）。須記錄符合PI 965-968的荷電狀態控制和瓦時門限。

standards_or_laws: ADR 2023 — European Agreement concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Road (Chapter 3.2 Dangerous Goods List, Chapter 5.2 marking/labelling)
ERG 2024 (Emergency Response Guidebook — Romanian translation recommended for in-country road transport)

summary.en: Chinese export DG documentation typically follows IMDG and IATA requirements as a baseline (required by carriers), but domestic labelling may follow GB 15258 (general requirements for chemical product safety labels) and GB 190 (dangerous goods packaging marks). These domestic standards do not substitute for ADR 2023 or IMDG 41-22 packaging/labelling requirements. Chinese DG shippers routinely prepare IMDG DGDs but may not prepare ADR documentation for Romanian in-country road transport.
summary.zh: 中国出口危险货物文件通常以IMDG和IATA要求为基准（承运人要求），但国内标识可能遵循GB 15258（化学品安全标签通用要求）和GB 190（危险货物包装标志）。上述国内标准不能替代ADR 2023或IMDG 41-22的包装和标识要求。中国危险货物托运方通常准备IMDG DGD，但可能不会为罗马尼亚境内公路运输准备ADR文件。
summary.zht: 中國出口危險貨物文件通常以IMDG和IATA要求為基準（承運人要求），但國內標識可能遵循GB 15258（化學品安全標籤通用要求）和GB 190（危險貨物包裝標誌）。上述國內標準不能替代ADR 2023或IMDG 41-22的包裝和標識要求。中國危險貨物托運方通常準備IMDG DGD，但可能不會為羅馬尼亞境內公路運輸準備ADR文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 15258-2009 — General rules for preparation of chemical product safety label
GB 190-2009 — Packaging marks for dangerous goods
IMDG DGD (prepared for export by Chinese forwarders)

gap.en: Key gap: ADR 2023 documentation and labelling for Romanian road transport legs is often not prepared by Chinese exporters or their freight forwarders. Romanian hauliers operating from Constanta require ADR-compliant transport documents in Romanian or a language accepted by Romanian authorities. Emergency response information in Romanian is recommended. Chinese domestic DG labels (GB 190) do not satisfy ADR/IMDG marking requirements.
gap.zh: 主要差距：中国出口商或其货运代理通常不为罗马尼亚公路运输段准备ADR 2023文件和标识。从康斯坦察运营的罗马尼亚承运方要求提供罗马尼亚语或罗马尼亚当局认可语言的ADR合规运输文件。推荐提供罗马尼亚语紧急响应信息。中国国内危险货物标签（GB 190）不满足ADR/IMDG标识要求。
gap.zht: 主要差距：中國出口商或其貨運代理通常不為羅馬尼亞公路運輸段準備ADR 2023文件和標識。從康斯坦察運營的羅馬尼亞承運方要求提供羅馬尼亞語或羅馬尼亞當局認可語言的ADR合規運輸文件。推薦提供羅馬尼亞語緊急響應信息。中國國內危險貨物標籤（GB 190）不滿足ADR/IMDG標識要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ADR 2023 road-transport DG documentation and labelling is legally required for all Class 9 lithium battery shipments on Romanian roads. IMDG 41-22 is mandatory for sea transport via Constanta.
mandatory_status.cn: IMDG DGD is required by carriers for Chinese export sea shipments. Domestic DG labelling (GB 190) is mandatory within China but does not satisfy ADR or IMDG international requirements.

source.publisher: Romanian Road Transport Authority (ISCTR — Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Transportul Rutier)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BESS exporters must ensure ADR 2023-compliant dangerous goods documents and labelling are prepared for Romanian road transport legs after Constanta port discharge. IMDG 41-22 DGD is required for sea shipment. Chinese domestic DG labels and documentation are insufficient for Romanian/EU transport compliance. Engage a qualified DG consultant or freight forwarder with ADR expertise.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国储能系统出口商须确保在康斯坦察港卸货后的罗马尼亚公路运输段，准备符合ADR 2023的危险货物文件和标识。海运须具备IMDG 41-22 DGD。中国国内危险货物标签和文件不满足罗马尼亚及欧盟运输合规要求。应聘请具备ADR专业知识的合格危险货物顾问或货运代理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國儲能系統出口商須確保在康斯坦察港卸貨後的羅馬尼亞公路運輸段，準備符合ADR 2023的危險貨物文件和標識。海運須具備IMDG 41-22 DGD。中國國內危險貨物標籤和文件不滿足羅馬尼亞及歐盟運輸合規要求。應聘請具備ADR專業知識的合格危險貨物顧問或貨運代理。
